title: [TACZ Addons] Daffa's Arsenal
description: Pushing TACZ (Timeless and Classic ZERO) to its limits with this gunpack!
body:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![arsenal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65c6fc82858b6b52614297058089046778b1adf5_0.webp)

</details>





**IF YOU GET PURPLE CHECKERBOARD YOU CAN TAKE "daffas" FOLDER FROM THE JAR AND PUT IT INTO "tacz" FOLDER**

**MAKE SURE TO INSTALL TACZ IN ORDER TO USE THE MOD!**

**BETTER BE PLAYED IN FOV 90 FOR CORRECT RETICLE POSITION!**

**THIS IS A MOD... SO INSTALL IT INTO MODS**

### Thanks for Donation: Sabastien, Antony, Monica

# Introducing Daffa's Arsenal
![fIRING](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcef5761f6a776caf3dcb85da5aa40c5e444a598.gif)

![crazy recoil](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e8b444f5133a756368d260de2b3ea4f0836626e.gif)

The only TACZ's Addons that delivers a firing feel nearly as satisfying as the latest Call of Duty titles. Built it myself—primarily focusing on firing animations, along with decent reload and inspect sequences. Powered by TACZ (Timeless and Classic Zero).

yes
